subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamored of the Beloved of all horizons! Thy letter was received and, praised be God, thou hast attained unto the companionship of the Bahá'ís and the supreme bounty of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون دلبر آفاق نامه رسید الحمد لله بمجالست بهائیان موفق و بفیض عظمای هدایت
